about.title: About Tripify
about.subtitle: Your trusted companion on every journey.
about.description: Tripify is a modern hotel booking platform providing premium experiences and diverse choices for travelers.
about.mission_desc: To connect travelers with ideal living spaces, creating memorable and convenient travel experiences.
about.vision_desc: To become the leading travel platform in Southeast Asia, known for reliability and innovation.
about.smart_booking_desc: Using AI to suggest hotels, optimizing user experience.
about.secure_payment_desc: Integrated secure and fast payment methods.
about.support_247_desc: Customer service team ready to help you anytime.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: Collaborating with industry leaders to bring you the best values.

commitments.title: Our Commitments
commitments.subtitle: Quality and trust are our top priorities.
commitments.c1_short: Tripify only partners with top-quality and reputable providers.
commitments.c1_full: We carefully select hotels, resorts, and travel providers that are fully licensed and highly rated by customers. Every partner must pass a rigorous audit of facilities and service standards.
commitments.c2_short: Easily change or cancel bookings with fast refund processing.
commitments.c2_full: If you need to change your schedule, Tripify supports you according to each hotel's policy. The refund process is automated and transparent.
commitments.c3_short: Your personal data is encrypted with the highest security standards.
commitments.c3_full: Tripify is committed to absolute security. Your personal data, payment info, and transaction history are all encrypted.
commitments.c4_short: Our support team is always ready to help you anytime.
commitments.c4_full: Contact us anytime via hotline, email, or live chat. Our specialists and AI chatbot are ready to assist with any issues.

faq.q1: How do I know my booking was successful?
faq.a1: After completing payment, you will receive a confirmation email. The status in "My Bookings" will change to "Confirmed".
faq.q2: How is the cancellation and refund policy calculated?
faq.a2: It depends on the hotel/host policy. Common levels: Free cancellation 24h/48h before, or 50-100% fee of the first night.
faq.a5: We support Visa, Mastercard, JCB, VNPay, MoMo, and Bank Transfer via QR Code.
faq.q8: How to recover my password if forgotten?
faq.a8: Click "Forgot Password" on the Login screen. Enter your email to receive a password reset link valid for 15 minutes.
